Platform Overview

Everything you need to understand and optimise your energy system

Flex connects to solar, battery, and site loads to provide:

  • Monitoring
  • Financial insight
  • Operational control
  • Performance assurance

Solar & Battery

Full visibility of generation and storage performance in real time.

Financial Insight

Translate energy data into cost, revenue, and ROI tracking.

Operational Control

Schedule and optimise battery behaviour to align with your business needs.

Performance Assurance

Compare forecast versus actual to validate ROI and detect issues early.

Portfolio

Manage your entire energy portfolio in one place.

Monitor all systems, identify issues, and prioritise action.

Portfolio-wide visibility Site comparison Alerts and issue identification

Value

Focus effort where it has the biggest impact. All of your systems in one place

Example

A multi-site business identifies an underperforming site and improves efficiency by aligning operations with solar generation.

Energy Dashboard

Understand how energy flows and what it costs.

See generation, consumption, import, and export in real time. Translate energy into financial insight with cost and revenue tracking.

Track self consumption metrics and make data driven decision that make real financial and measurable impact. .

Energy flow visibility Financial tracking System health monitoring

Value

Make decisions that reduce energy costs.

Example

Shifting operations into solar hours reduces grid import and daily costs.

Load Monitoring

Stay within your site's limits and avoid downtime.

Track real-time load across all phases and receive alerts before exceeding capacity.

Real-time load monitoring Threshold alerts Peak demand visibility

Value

Prevent outages and avoid costly repairs.

Example

An alert helps avoid exceeding capacity and prevents a blown fuse.

Scheduling

Take control of how your energy is used.

Schedule battery charge and discharge to align with your business needs.

Charge/discharge scheduling Self-consumption optimisation Flexible control

Value

Maximise battery ROI and reduce costs.

Example

Charging during solar and discharging at peak pricing reduces grid costs.

Flex:Assure

Ensure your system is delivering what was promised.

Compare actual performance against forecast to validate expected outcomes are being achieved.

Forecast vs actual tracking Performance insights

Value

Validate ROI and detect issues early.

Example

Large rooftop Solar array under performs due to soiled panels identified and corrected, restoring expected output and saving thousand of dollar in lost generation.

01

Performance Validation

Compare actual output against your system's modelled expectations — continuously and automatically.

02

ROI Tracking

Turn performance data into clear financial outcomes. See what your system is worth in real dollars.

03

Early Issue Detection

Spot underperformance before it becomes a costly problem — giving you time to act, not react.

Real-World Outcomes

What Flex Delivers

  • Increase solar self-consumption
  • Reduce peak demand costs
  • Improve efficiency without new hardware

Case Study

An industrial site improves performance by shifting load and scheduling battery use.

Outcome

Higher self-consumption, lower costs, improved ROI.
